corpus.title: Failureforge Cargo Check Success Procedure
corpus.content: Success pattern: run cargo check after each focused patch and commit only after all tests pass.

corpus.title: Failureforge Cargo Check Loop Lesson
corpus.content: Lesson: After the third identical cargo check failure, stop editing and challenge the hypothesis before changing more code.

corpus.title: 墨河夜间备份恢复批准人
